entity.label: Hammoth-dor
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Warm springs, a Levitical city of Naphtali (Josh. 21:32); probably Hammath in 19:35.

nodes.label: Hammoth-dor
nodes.description: Warm springs, a Levitical city of Naphtali (Josh. 21:32); probably Hammath in 19:35.

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Naphtali, Kedesh in Galilee with her suburbs, to be a city of refuge for the slayer; and Hammothdor with her suburbs, and Kartan with her suburbs; three cities.
